mapper.sql: select questionnaire_id, questionnaire_name, description, status, version_no, source_questionnaire_id, published_time, ended_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from survey_questionnaire
mapper.select:
del_flag = '0'
AND questionnaire_name like '%' || #{questionnaireName} || '%'
AND status = #{status}
order by create_time desc, questionnaire_id desc

select question_id, questionnaire_id, question_title, question_type, required_flag, dimension, score_max, order_num, del_flag from survey_question where questionnaire_id = #{questionnaireId} and del_flag = '0' order by order_num, question_id

select o.option_id, o.question_id, o.option_type, o.option_label, o.option_value, o.score_value, o.order_num from survey_question_option o inner join survey_question q on q.question_id = o.question_id where q.questionnaire_id = #{questionnaireId} and q.del_flag = '0' order by o.question_id, o.option_type, o.order_num, o.option_id
select max(version_no) from survey_questionnaire where del_flag = '0' and (questionnaire_id = #{rootQuestionnaireId} or source_questionnaire_id = #{rootQuestionnaireId})
mapper.update:
update survey_questionnaire set del_flag = '2' where questionnaire_id in
#{questionnaireId}
mapper.insert: insert into survey_question( questionnaire_id, question_title, question_type, required_flag, dimension, score_max, order_num, del_flag ) values ( #{questionnaireId}, #{questionTitle}, #{questionType}, #{requiredFlag}, #{dimension}, #{scoreMax}, #{orderNum}, '0' )

insert into survey_question_option( question_id, option_type, option_label, option_value, score_value, order_num ) values
(#{item.questionId}, #{item.optionType}, #{item.optionLabel}, #{item.optionValue}, #{item.scoreValue}, #{item.orderNum})
